title: FCP Event Envelope
description: One line of an events.jsonl stream. See SPEC.md §6.1.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred.

id.description: Globally unique event ID, e.g. a ULID.

source.description: The <source-id> that emitted this event (email, DID, or stable system name).

type.description: Dotted event type, e.g. goal.set, role.changed, link.shared, lifeevent.recorded.

audience.description: Optional gating hint: which destination(s) this event may be folded into. A string, list of strings, or 'self' for owner-only.

payload.description: Type-specific body. Shape is defined per event type by the implementation.

prov.description: Optional provenance (e.g. tool, commit, upstream source).
